name_cn:
M81561 Black
Crafted from grained Taurillon leather, this piece features a color contrast between the inside and outside. The LV letter slide buckle references the Capucines handbag's closure design. The exquisite structure conceals ample space with card slots and a zippered accordion compartment for coins. 9 x 12 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
